name: The Strategic R/3 Solution for the Enterprise
description: This vendor presentation by Sequent Computer Systems presents the SAP R/3 SD benchmark results achieved on the Sequent Symmetry SE70 SMP server running R/3 version 2.2d on both Windows NT and UNIX. The document positions the Sequent platform favorably versus HP, Sun/Cray, and IBM on user count, independent certification, and RDBMS CPU utilization.
